pending.title: Account pending approval
pending.message: Your account is pending approval by an administrator. We will notify you when it is approved.
pending.spamNote: If you don't receive the email, please check your spam folder or contact us.

rejected.title: Account rejected
rejected.message: Your account request has been rejected. Please contact the administrator for more information.
rejected.errorNote: If you believe this is an error, please contact us.
